title: Careers at Daikin
subtitle: Join a global leader in air technology and build a career that matters.

hero.title: Grow With Us
hero.body: Daikin Indonesia offers challenging, rewarding careers across engineering, sales, marketing, service, and corporate functions.

global.title: Global Company
global.body: Be part of a Fortune 500 company with operations in 170+ countries.

growth.title: Career Growth
growth.body: Structured career paths with mentoring, training, and international mobility.

impact.title: Meaningful Work
impact.body: Work on products that improve air quality and quality of life for millions.

benefits.title: Great Benefits
benefits.body: Competitive salary, health insurance, pension, and performance bonuses.

openings.title: Open Positions
openings.noJobs: No open positions in this department right now. Check back soon or send us your resume.

success.title: Application Submitted!
success.body: Thank you for your interest. We'll review your application and get back to you within 2 weeks.
